Airtime.php.title: Airtime Purchase Guide 📱
steps: Select your Network Provider (MTN, Airtel, etc.).
Enter the Phone Number or pick from favorites.
Input the Amount you want to buy.
💡 AI Tip: Just say 'Buy MTN 100 airtime for 08012345678' to the bot.

Data.php.title: Data Subscription Guide 🌐
steps: Choose your Network and Data Plan.
Select Data Type (SME, Gifting, etc.) - MANDATORY.
💡 AI Tip: Use 'Buy Airtel 1GB SME data for 08123456789'.

Electric.php.title: Bill Payment Guide ⚡
steps: Select your DisCo and Meter Type (Prepaid/Postpaid).
Enter your Meter or Account Number.
Click 'Verify' to see the Account Name.
💡 AI Tip: Try 'Pay 5000 for AEDC Prepaid 010123456789'.
